name: flight_confirmation_01
description: Flight booking confirmation with departure and arrival times

input.subject: Your Flight Confirmation - United Airlines
input.snippet: Thank you for booking with United Airlines...
input.body_text:
UNITED AIRLINES
Flight Confirmation

Confirmation Number: ABC123
Passenger: JOHN DOE

══════════════════════════════════════
OUTBOUND FLIGHT
══════════════════════════════════════
Flight: UA 1234
Date: Friday, March 13, 2026

Depart: San Francisco (SFO)
        8:00 AM

Arrive: New York JFK (JFK)
        4:35 PM

Duration: 5h 35m
Class: Economy (K)
Seat: 24A (Window)

══════════════════════════════════════
RETURN FLIGHT
══════════════════════════════════════
Flight: UA 5678
Date: Sunday, March 15, 2026

Depart: New York JFK (JFK)
        7:00 PM

Arrive: San Francisco (SFO)
        10:15 PM

Duration: 6h 15m
Class: Economy (K)
Seat: 18F (Window)

══════════════════════════════════════

Ticket Number: 0167891234567
Total Paid: $456.78

Manage your booking: united.com/mytrips

Thank you for flying United!

events.title: Flight UA 1234 - SFO to JFK
events.description: United Airlines flight to New York JFK

events.title: Flight UA 5678 - JFK to SFO

notes: Round trip flight with two separate events for outbound and return
